memoryArtifacts.description: "Conyers, of Horden, Durham," in Arthur Collins, "The English Baronetage: Containing a Genealogical and Historical Account of All the English Baronets, Now Existing: Their Descents, Marriages, and Issues; Memorable Actions, Both in War, and Peace; Religious and Charitable Donations; Deaths, Places of Burial and Monumental Inscriptions," Volume 2. zh.New Malton, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾劍橋大學默里 馬爾頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn於1421年5月31日出生在英國越可爾劍橋大學默里 馬爾頓時，他的父親Robert Conyers41歲，母親Elizabeth Pert41歲。他於1433年2月2日與Marjory Eure在英國達勒姆索可本結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1487年3月13日在英國達勒姆索可本享年65歲。

zh-hans.New Malton, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾劍橋大學默里 馬爾頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn于1421年5月31日出生在英国越可爾劍橋大學默里 馬爾頓时，他的父亲Robert Conyers41岁，母亲Elizabeth Pert41岁。他于1433年2月2日与Marjory Eure在英国達勒姆索可本结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1487年3月13日在英国達勒姆索可本享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Conyers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire, of Norman origin): habitational name from either of two places in northern France, Coignières in Seine-et-Oise or Cogners in Sarthe. Alternatively, a variant of Conyer , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Conyer
meanings: English: occupational name for a minter, a coiner of money, from an agent derivative of Old French coignier ‘to stamp money, to mint’.

nameMeanings.name: Christopher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn was born on 31 May 1421, in New Malton, Yorkshire, England, his father, Robert Conyers, was 41 and his mother, Elizabeth Pert, was 41. He married Marjory Eure on 2 February 1433, in Sockburn, Durham, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 13 March 1487, in Sockburn, Durham, England, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn est né le 31 mai 1421, à New Malton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert Conyers, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Pert, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Marjory Eure le 2 février 1433, à Sockburn, Durham, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 13 mars 1487, à Sockburn, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn am 31. Mai 1421 in New Malton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Conyers 41 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Pert 41. Er hat am 2. Februar 1433 in Sockburn, Durham, England Marjory Eure geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 13. März 1487 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Sockburn, Durham, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn è nato il il 31 maggio 1421 nel New Malton, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Conyers, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Pert, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Marjory Eure il 2 febbraio 1433, nel Sockburn, Durham, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 13 marzo 1487, nel Sockburn, Durham, England, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.Sockburn, Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburnが1421年5月31日にイギリスヨークシュアイアニュー マルトンで生まれた時，父Robert Conyersは41歳，母Elizabeth Pertは41歳であった。1433年2月2日にイギリスダルハムソクブルンでMarjory Eureと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1487年3月13日にイギリスダルハムソクブルンで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn(이)가 1421년 5월 31일 영국 요르크실르 뉴 맬턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Conyers(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Pert(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1433년 2월 2일 영국 뒤람 속번에서 Marjory Eure(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1487년 3월 13일 영국 뒤람 속번에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.31 May 1421–13 March 1487: 1421 оны Тавдугаар сарын 31–1487 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 13

pt.31 May 1421–13 March 1487: 31 de maio de 1421–13 de março de 1487
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn nasceu em 31 de maio de 1421, em New Malton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Conyers, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Pert, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Marjory Eure em 2 de fevereiro de 1433, em Sockburn, Durham, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de março de 1487, em Sockburn, Durham, Inglaterra, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn родился 31 мая 1421 г. в местности ню малтон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Conyers было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Pert, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Marjory Eure 2 февраля 1433 г. в местности соккбурн, дурам, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 13 марта 1487 г. в местности соккбурн, дурам, Англия в возрасте 65 лет.

es.31 May 1421–13 March 1487: 31 de mayo de 1421–13 de marzo de 1487
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn nació el 31 de mayo de 1421, en New Malton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Conyers, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Pert, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Marjory Eure el 2 de febrero de 1433, en Sockburn, Durham, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 13 de marzo de 1487, en Sockburn, Durham, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años.
